description:
The Legend of Zelda needs almost no introduction. Gather the eight fragments of the
Triforce of Wisdom, enter Death Mountain, defeat Ganon, and rescue Princess Zelda.
This randomizer shuffles all the items in the game around, leading to a new adventure
every time.

TLOZ-V2.description:
All the hard work was done by Rosalie-A. I'm just hosting the apworld so it is easier to link to and to have some notes about installation.
**PLEASE READ NOTES AT END! THIS ISN'T YOUR TYPICAL APWORLD INSTALL!**

New Features since v1:
- Migrated from a custom client to Bizhawk Client.
- Migrated to APProcedurePatch so rom is no longer needed for generation
- Added in new options for weapon and defense logic.
- Added in Entrance Randomization options.

Note: since this is an apworld for a currently supported AP game, you will need to backup your old tloz.apworld and replace it with this one. Also, with the transition to using Bizhawk Client, you will need to manually open aptloz patch files with Bizhawk Client, as Archipelago will still try to associate said patches with the old Zelda1 Client until this update is fully merged and released.
TLOZ-V2.title: TLOZ v2 APWorld

ooa.description:
Initial release of the APWorld for The Legend of Zelda: Oracle of Ages

### ⚠️ Disclaimer

This is an early build, not completely stable, and there is still a risk of softlock at the moment (as I was alone to test it until now)
I reccomand you to NOT use it in large game right now.

### 🛠️ How to use

- Copy the following apworld in your archipelago installation in the folder lib / worlds
- Generate templates all games yaml and grab the one for Oracle of Ages.
- Modify the yaml as you see fit and put it in the Player folder of your Archipelago Installation _(NOTE : Some feature are currently not implemented, make sure to read the description of the option, some of them are there, but are not properly implemented, and were not removed as they are planned for the next release)_
- Generate your archipelago game, and put the result on the website. 
- Launch the .apooa file with archipelago
- If this is the first time you launch a OOA world, archipelago will ask you to give a vanilla Oracle of Ages (US) rom
- If this the first time you launch a world that automatically launch the game, it will ask for the EmuHawk executable.
- Don't forget to connect the bizhawk client to the server.
- Enjoy.
- Be BKed after 2 checks.

### ↪️ Change between the original Ages rando and this one

- Additionnal checks, which include : 
  - All trade NPC (including maple)
  - All standalone Heartpieces locations
  - All shops (including the advance shop, and excluding the tokay market) now include three checks (except syrup which only has two, as one is for the potions)
  - The Gasha Farmer
  - The bomb Fairy
  - Vasu
  - Patch (which has an item for repairing the tuni nut and another for the broken sword)
  - The Treasure Seeking Goron at the top of the mountain
- D2 present entrance is currently not a viable way to enter D2 (may change later)
- A lot of feature are still missing (Keysanity, dungeon shuffle, QOLs etc...)

### 🚧 Work in progress

- Dungeon Shuffle
- Keysanity
- Master Keys (Keyrings)
- Combat Difficulty
- Impa Refill
- Quick Flute QOL
- Siren QOL
- Harp QOL
- Hearth interval
- Custom Sprites

### 🪲 Known bugs

- Some locations doesn't show their item properly (and show instead the vanilla item). This include :
  - The Hidden Tokay
  - Cheval Invention
  - Cheval Test
  - Patch Tuni nut Ceremony
  - Patch Broken Sword Ceremony
- Maku Tree gift doesn't drop properly (instead just spawn on the ground)
- Flute sprite show the strange flute sprite instead of the correct companion flute sprite
- There is some strange visual glitch when you open and close a menu.
- Progressive Shield doesn't work properly if you lose you shield to a like-like
- Default Seed is not always the same seed than in Lynna city

### Fixed between 0.1.0 and 0.1.1

- Fixed the generation issue if accessibility is set to something else than location.
- Fixed an issue where advance shop was still accounted in the logic.

### Fixed between 0.1.1 and 0.1.2

- Fixed the inventory being filedl of invisible item and preventing player to have more item.
- Fixed Maple always giving her check.
- Fixed The Tuninut Brother not giving their check if the player had the cracked tuni nut in their inventory.
ooa.title: Oracle of Ages 0.1.2
